title: My Immortal
why_this_song: My Immortal by Evanescence (2003) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 5 times; first heard in: "These wounds won't seem to heal"
Appears 4 times; first heard in: "Suppressed by all my childish fears"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "And if you have to leave"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "And it won't leave me alone"
Appears 3 times; first heard in: "When you cried, I'd wipe away all of your tears"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: But you still have all of me
You used to captivate me by your resonating light
Now I'm bound by the life you left behind
These wounds won't seem to heal
This pain is just too real
There's just too much that time cannot erase

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "these" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "these" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "fears" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I'm so tired of being here
These wounds won't seem to heal
This pain is just too real

exercises.prompt_en: Rewrite the chorus of "My Immortal" in your own words — keep the meaning but change the style (formal, slang, poetic, whatever you like).
exercises.prompt_pt: Reescreva o refrão de "My Immortal" com suas palavras — mantenha o sentido mas mude o estilo (formal, gíria, poético, o que preferir).

exercises.prompt_en: If you had to summarize "My Immortal" in one sentence to someone who has never heard it, what would you say?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você tivesse que resumir "My Immortal" em uma frase para alguém que nunca ouviu, o que diria?

exercises.prompt_en: What kind of person do you imagine the narrator of "My Immortal" is? Describe their age, mood, and situation using at least three details from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: Que tipo de pessoa você imagina ser o narrador de "My Immortal"? Descreva a idade, o humor e a situação usando pelo menos três detalhes da letra.

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
